text_block_list.text:
Something's been troubling Seiun Sky, so one day
I decide to approach her about it.
choice_data_list: Let's talk once we're done training.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sure.
After training...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, I know. I'll be right back after I
change.
I wait for a few minutes, but she doesn't show.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I see, so she's playin' hooky again. Sorry, but she
hasn't come back to the dorm yet.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The nerve of her to just break a promise like that!
Should I grab her by the collar and scream some
sense into her?!

After I finally manage to calm down the
overexcited Hishi Amazon...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What do we have here? Sky's trainer?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I understand. I'll help you search for her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I have something I want to tell her
myself actually.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, I say search, but I already have an idea of
where she might be.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? You do?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Obviously. Shouldn't you too, Trainer?

If she's not in her dorm, that means there's only
one place she could be...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. Not a single bite.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This is so boring.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer. Why's King with you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I also have something to discuss with you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll just come right out and say it. You've been
acting strange recently. Just... weird!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You've always been irresponsible, but you've had
a certain tenacious spirit hidden behind all those
layers of laziness.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now though? You merely lie about like a deflated
balloon!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nya-ha-ha, what a horrible thing to say.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This is what I mean! I hate it when you give me
that stupid smile!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We know something's bothering you! So tell us
what's going on!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Fine. I'll tell you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm sick of racing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So my enthusiasm disappeared—kapoof. Is that a
good enough explanation for you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
After coming this far... you still won't quit it with
your horrible jokes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You think I would joke about this?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's a lie—you're not sick of racing. It's just that
you're scared of losing, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So you're carelessly running away from something
you have to face!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...No, I'm not.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You are!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Right now you're... you're so far below first-rate!
It's super lame!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Listen...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You can say whatever you want, but at the end of
the day, this has nothing to do with you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...But it does!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Because I... I... I got as far as I have from watching you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We're our generation's big three. That's what
everyone called us, and it made me proud every
time I heard it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But after the Kikuka Sho... I was no longer part of
that group.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I was so ashamed... It was painful. I didn't know
what to do.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And that's when you told me, "at your final wrong
turn, you'll have found the right path."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I never would have had that realization on my
own.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's when I decided I would run down my own
path—the path that makes me shine the brightest!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I found my path, and I'm finally ready to face you
again, except...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now you're pulling this! Why are you stopping
here?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Do you really not want to win anymore?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I've had enough... I misjudged you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So just stay there, wasting your days away for the
rest of your life! I don't care anymore!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: If she misjudged me, well... that's her problem.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Leave me alone for a while... Please.

Her voice is so faint, it's like she's fading away. I
can't bring myself to respond.
